steps.title: Find the key phrase in the claim
steps.content: The passage emphasizes the soldiers' “renewed sense of agency and authority” — we need a quotation showing them asserting power or taking control, not merely moving or observing.

steps.title: Match the clue to the quotation
steps.content:
C shows the soldiers actively asserting control: they “threw out their chests,” “spurred their horses to a gallop,” and “laid claims of possession to the earth” — all concrete displays of agency and authority.

The other three focus on landscape details, religious atmosphere, or reverence rather than soldiers exercising power.

That confirms C is correct.
